# Contributing

## Setup

### 1. Fork and clone the repository

```bash
# After forking the repository, copy the url and run:
$ git clone https://github.com/[USERNAME]/kbot.git
$ cd kbot
```

### 2. Create and configure the .env files

```bash
$ cp .env.example .env
```

### 3. Install dependencies

```bash
$ yarn install
```

### 4. Build project

```bash
$ yarn build
```

### 5. Start coding (make sure to run `yarn lint` occasionally).

### 6. Open a pull request with your changes.
